caption:
Some of the 60 restaurants to choose from this Summer Restaurant Week. 😃

Summer Restaurant Week is the best time to dine out with family and friends! Special set menus are at AED 95 for two course lunch and AED 150 onwards for three course dinner! Kids’ menus are also available at AED 35.

🗓️ Until August 27, 2023 only
📲 Book your table now!
